  "findings": [
    "Differential pressure impulse lines are sloped incorrectly for the service type.",
    "Gas taps are located below the pipe centerline, risking liquid accumulation in the lines.",
    "Liquid taps are located on top of the pipe, risking gas pocket entrapment in the lines."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-route and re-install the impulse lines and tap connections to match API RP 551 guidelines.",
    "Ensure gas taps are taken from the top or side of the process line, and liquid taps are taken from the side of the process line."
  ],
  "rationale": "The impulse line orientation is reversed for the process services. Gas taps must be taken from the top or side of the process line to prevent liquid accumulation, and liquid taps must be taken from the side to prevent gas entrapment. This violates API RP 551 and standard manufacturer installation guidelines, leading to measurement errors or plugged lines.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 551",
    "Manufacturer Installation Manuals"
  ]
}
